prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: runtime combat effect sprite for a tactics game
Primary request: create The Order Field Mend effect
Subject: a warm ivory and crimson restorative sigil with rising motes, ceremonial field-medic geometry, and clear healing read
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D effect sprite, moody post-apocalyptic tactics look with late-90s strategy RPG readability
Composition/framing: single centered support bloom effect, circular or vertical read, tight bounds, designed for a 320x320 runtime asset
Lighting/mood: benevolent warm glow with calm focus, not explosive
Color palette: ivory, pale gold, crimson, soft mint healing accents
Constraints: transparent background, no scenery, no text, no border, no character, no floor, no vignette, no black backdrop, no oversized empty padding
Avoid: fire burst, photorealism, glossy 3D, anime FX, generic holy wing icon

Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: runtime combat effect sprite for a tactics game. Primary request: create the Mending Salve item effect. Subject: a compact neutral restorative poultice bloom with soft herbal vapor, medicinal motes, and a subtle restorative ring, but no literal bottles, no pouches, no herbs bundle, and no item icon depiction. Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D effect sprite, moody post-apocalyptic tactics look with late-90s strategy RPG readability. Composition/framing: single centered support bloom effect, smaller and simpler than Field Mend, tight bounds, designed for a 320x320 runtime asset. Lighting/mood: gentle restorative glow, practical not grand. Color palette: soft ivory, desaturated sage green, pale amber, faint teal only if needed. Constraints: transparent background, no scenery, no text, no border, no character, no floor, no vignette, no black backdrop, no oversized empty padding, no literal item illustration, no glass bottle, no bag, no herb sprig. Avoid: strong faction heraldry, photorealism, glossy 3D, anime FX, explosive burst, inventory icon look.
